global.description: The ad features a vibrant design with abstract shapes and prominent text elements.
global.main_message: Promoting trending content with a call to action.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: A collection of abstract shapes including an oval and a square, rendered in a soft orange background.

elements.label: Circular elements
elements.description: Two small circles positioned within the abstract shapes, blending into the overall design.

elements.label: Main content area
elements.description: A central area featuring a large square shape, surrounded by abstract elements.

elements.label: Bottom decorative element
elements.description: A small rectangular shape at the bottom, subtly integrated into the design.

elements.label: Small circular element
elements.description: A tiny circle located towards the bottom left, adding to the abstract theme.

elements.label: Trending message
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Watch what's trending Cancel anytime' prominently displayed in the center.

elements.label: NeonCast logo
elements.description: The logo 'NeonCast' in a bold font, positioned at the top of the ad against a contrasting background.

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A small button with the text 'Learn more' in white, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label marked 'UGC' in a circular format, positioned at the top left corner.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, trending content, call to action
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Watch what's trending, Cancel anytime, NeonCast, Learn more, UGC
